title: HSE – Health, Safety & Environment
description: Emergency procedures, injury prevention, and workplace safety

sections.text: In case of emergency, ALWAYS contact a team leader (green uniform) first. Emergency number: 113

sections.title: What to do in an emergency:

animatedSteps.title: Alert a team leader
animatedSteps.description: Contact anyone in green uniform immediately

animatedSteps.title: Call 113 if needed
animatedSteps.description: For serious injuries or life-threatening situations

animatedSteps.title: Evacuate if alarm sounds
animatedSteps.description: Follow your team leader's instructions to the meeting point

animatedSteps.title: Report the incident
animatedSteps.description: Use Datakvalitet app or the anonymous box near the canteen

sections.title: Important to remember:
items: 🔔 There is one alarm signal – follow team leader instructions
📍 There are designated meeting points for evacuation (see map)
🫀 AED defibrillators are available – only trained personnel should use them
⚠️ Never try to handle a serious emergency alone

sections.text: If you get injured during your shift, you must leave the production area immediately.

sections.title: What to do if you get injured:

animatedSteps.title: Stop working
animatedSteps.description: Do not continue if you are injured

animatedSteps.title: Contact a team leader
animatedSteps.description: Find anyone wearing green – they will help you

animatedSteps.title: Treat the wound
animatedSteps.description: Leave the production area and treat the wound properly

animatedSteps.title: See a doctor if needed
animatedSteps.description: If you cannot continue working, seek medical evaluation

sections.title: Reporting injuries and near-misses:
items: 📱 Use the Datakvalitet app (must be installed on your phone)
📮 Use the anonymous report box located before the canteen entrance
👷 Report directly to a team leader, HR, or whoever you need
⚠️ Near-misses should also be reported – they help prevent future accidents

sections.text: The main risks at Vikenco are cuts from knives and hand injuries from machines.

sections.title: Most common risks:
items: Cuts from knives on the production line
Hand injuries from machinery – NEVER put your hand inside a machine
Slips and falls (always wear safety boots)
Repetitive strain injuries (task rotation every 2 hours helps prevent this)

sections.title: Prevention measures:
items: 🔒 LOTO (Lock Out / Tag Out) – machines must be locked before maintenance
🧤 Always wear gloves – change vinyl gloves immediately if torn
🔪 Handle knives carefully – always cut away from your body
🥾 Safety boots are mandatory in all production areas
🩹 Use blue plasters only (detectable by metal detectors)

sections.title: Working conditions:
items: 🌡️ Production area is approximately 22°C
🧥 You may wear a hoodie without hood if needed for warmth
🔄 Task rotation every 2 hours to prevent repetitive strain
☕ If your break is at 08:00, next break at 10:30, then 13:00

sections.text: Vikenco focuses on preventing musculoskeletal injuries through ergonomic workstations and regular task rotation.
All products pass through metal detectors. This is critical for food safety.

animatedSteps.title: Products on the line
animatedSteps.description: All boxes pass through the metal detector

animatedSteps.title: Detector alerts
animatedSteps.description: If the detector gives a positive signal, the conveyor belt stops

animatedSteps.title: Evaluation
animatedSteps.description: The tolerance of the positive is evaluated – is it real or a false alarm?

animatedSteps.title: Decision
animatedSteps.description: Product is approved or removed from the line

sections.title: Why blue plasters?
items: 🩹 Blue plasters contain metal traces
🔍 If a plaster falls off, the metal detector will catch it
🐟 This ensures no foreign objects end up in the final product
⚠️ NEVER use regular plasters in production – always use the blue ones provided

sections.text: ALL employees must obtain an aviation security background check certificate. This is mandatory.

sections.title: How to get your background check:
items: 🌐 Visit: https://www.luftfartstilsynet.no/aktorer/bakgrunnssjekk/
📝 Apply for the certificate online
⏳ Processing may take some time – apply as soon as possible
📄 Submit the certificate to HR when received

sections.title: Your onboarding includes:
items: 📚 HMS training for all new employees
🔄 Continuous training throughout your employment
🧪 Practical training in your specific work area
📱 Install the Datakvalitet app for incident reporting

sections.text: Vikenco invests in continuous training to ensure everyone works safely and efficiently.
